individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Placement is not provided by the college, but they have a counseling team that will advise about your career and also does career counseling for the students. Yes. Our college does provide internships. Students who pursue post-graduation courses have an option to do internships in the field of teaching and other work too. I don't know how much they get.
content.Infrastructure: I have passed a B.A. general from this college. I don't live in the hostel, but from what I've seen, I don't like it. Mess food is not of good quality either. The hostel fee is Rs. 17,000 per year. There is a small room with 2 people sharing it. It has an almirah, table, chair, and bed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good college worthy to join.

content.Placements: Students who got a Minimum of 80% in their degree got jobs in IT the sector. Most of the students are placed in INFOSYS which is a highly recommended IT company. Minimum packages are 400000 which are given by the INFOSYS to the students who are placed there.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are neat and clean, fully airy, and with no brightening issues. Labs are too good. Fully air conditioner. Library is also good. Sorted books. Different apartments for the particular classes and subjects. Our college doesn't contain any wi-fi facilities. Games and sports field is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Non-Medical - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for girls.

content.Placements: In our batch, there were above 90 students in our section, and only 10-15 students got placed in some banks and software companies. I did not participate in any one of them, but it is useful for B.Sc computer science, BCA department and B.Com also. I want to become a teacher, so I am not interested in placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was very good, and hostels are also in good condition. The complete building is very good. The main thing is the library which was well-maintained. The second best part of our college is discipline. The only problem I faced during my graduation is the bus pass.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Best among all for the girls in sense of affordable fee according to our level.

content.Placements: There were atleast 65 students in my course. As a teacher the highest package was offered it was approximately rs 18000. At least 65% students got selected for internship in rural areas. We served for NGOs as well. It was my best experience of entire life that I had.
content.Infrastructure: Library was fully furnished. With each n every facility. classrooms were clean. N labs were fully equipped. Hostel. Facility was the best part of college. As being a student of small city it was difficult for me to adjust. But due to availability of every needed thing made me stay there till the completion of my degree.

review_summary.college_name: S.D. College, Barnala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Wings to my life, flatterers to my fight.

content.Placements: The college provides placement, but not to everyone. It's almost based on luck whether we get it or not. The college is below average in providing placement to the students. But, in its Cart Iris, the college is very good, and I am very happy to be a part of this college. It gives placement to deserving students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course is very good. They also provide a good environment to study, and teach us many good and new things that help us a lot in our studies and life. All classrooms are properly ventilated.
content.Faculty: The faculty, curriculum, and exams for my course are very good. They conduct semester-wise exams, and in a very good manner. The faculty of the college listens to our every problem and addresses them. They also provide us with faculty. I get many opportunities here, and the teachers are very experienced in their work.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college review in my course.

content.Placements: About 300 students got placed in my course. In my course, the highest package offered is nearly 16 LPA. Students who belong to the SC category are able to apply for their scholarships through Dr Bheem Rao Ambedkar's scholarship scheme. Half of the students got internships from this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a big and beautiful building. Many students from different villages come to study here. There is a big playground. Many classrooms have windows and fans. There are many labs like a mathematics lab, computer lab, physics lab, chemistry lab, etc. There is a library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: One of the top colleges in the district (Barnala).

content.Placements: Near 400 students were placed in my course. The highest package in my course is 16 thousand per semester. In our area, this is the best college among Barnala. Near 50% of students got internships from our course in many companies. In short, this is a good college to grow our future.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is very big. There are many classrooms with fresh air, fans, and windows. There is a huge library with many kinds of books that we can read. There is a big playground for students for sports activities. There are also many labs, like the physics lab, chemistry lab, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Average college for middle class students.

content.Placements: The placement is not up to the mark. Only 2-3 % got placement, others have to join local firms. The highest package offered was 4 lakhs per annum. Top recruitment was from Amazon, Airtel etc. The average package offered is 2 lakhs. The roles offered are for accounting and taxation assistance.
content.Infrastructure: Students from nearby villages can get college bus and bus passes for easy & affordable transportation. The building is well maintained and campus provides a good Wi-Fi connection. College library provides free books to needy and also many newspaper's, magazines in the college. College canteen provides fresh and good food. There are many sports that student can play ranging from chess to football. There is annual college athletic meet.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college has good facilities and helpful environment.

content.Placements: The college charges a fee of Rs. 15,000 to 20,000 for a 1-year course. Students should score an average of 65 to 70% in their academics to get admission here, and for SC and lower cast, they will provide scholarships. For internships, students should score more than 70 to 90% in their academics. Most of the students get an entry in the college easily, and their scholarship system is the best.
content.Infrastructure: Food is normal and like home, and we also had a change of a menu. Sometimes we get a routine like 8 in the morning we get snacks, and after that, a meal in the dinner. If it's hot outside, then they also provide drinks, but we needed to buy drinks. In the evening, they serve breakfast, and after that, we get night dinner.

overview_faqs.question: Is Adarsh Bhartiya College worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: Adarsh Bhartiya College is a distinguished institution offering M.Com, M.Sc, M.A, PGDCA, B.Sc, B.A, BBA, BCA, B.Com. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Accounting & Commerce, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Medicine & Health Sciences field. Adarsh Bhartiya College is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Adarsh Bhartiya College has received an impressive review rating of 3.85 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4.75 for Campus Life, 3 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3.75 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Adarsh Bhartiya College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Non Medical) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good placement for BCA students.

content.Placements: Most of the students go for M.Sc. or B.Ed. Many classmates cleared the various exams but for information. The special seminars were conducted and every student knew about the various requirements in the area so that they could easily avail themselves and do their jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were well-equipped and every lab had a lab attendant and a store room for keeping apparatus and chemicals. Teachers use the demonstration method for giving hands-on learning and proper time was a good thing about our course which increases learning.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: We had very experienced teachers.

content.Placements: Approximately 40% of students get successful placements in our college. Most placements were done in our course. The average salary package was 4 LPAs. The top recruiters were from banking and financial firms. The top recruiting companies were Axis Bank, HDFC, KPMG, etc. The top posts offered were accountant, analysts, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at our college were really impressive. Our institute has very well-maintained and amazing infrastructure. Talking about the facilities, the college provided facilities like labs, a canteen, a library, Wi-Fi, and a sports playground. Our college promotes sports activities throughout the year. The food in the college canteen was average. There was no college hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Placements should be maximised otherwise it is a good college.

content.Placements: About 30% of students get placements after the completion of the course and about 20% of students are hired by companies for training during the courses. The salary packages are offered as per the qualifications or skill development of students. Infosys, Wipro, Skyline, etc., are the companies that often visit and hire students. About 80% and above students surely get internships and 60-80% holders may get internships. A lot of fields are available according to the interest of students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is so good. We have different blocks for each stream. I am not living in hostel as I am local student so can't review about mess's food. But the canteen is good and affordable with quality food. Sports and games are also available. We often had extracurricular activities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I recommend to join this college.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA. Some top recruiting companies like Wipro, Google, Max Stiffen, etc., often visited our college for placements. The role offered to students was managing director.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was the best. There were large and separate blocks for each field.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were well-qualified, innovative, and helpful. They made students ready for the industry. Red Hat and Linux coaching were also provided to studious students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college only for students who are ready to read from home.

content.Placements: Our college usually invites companies to interview students, but most of them are for engineering courses. Our course doesn't get many in-campus placements, and the one we get has very limited seats. Top roles offered in our college are business's accountant or a bank job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi isn't available for students since there is no hostel. Classrooms and labs are huge and are clean. Quality of food served in the canteen is above average, and there is proper sanitation is maintained, and our college does have sports teams.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the candidates have to submit a minor project in the first semester of this course. It is a non-teaching credit course. overview_faqs.question: What is the mode of study for PhD at Amity School of Communication?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity School of Communication offers PhD programme in Mass Communication across two modes of study. The school provide the doctoral-level programme in full-time and part-time modes. Duration of the full-time PhD course is three years. While, the part-time PhD course is 3.5 years long. Candidates have to complete the course within this time period to gain the degree.

admission_overview.description: Amity School of Communication admission 2025 are both entrance and merit-based followed by a personal interview round. The school requires a written test for admission in MBA. However, applicants who achieve or surpass a predetermined aggregate score may be granted direct admission without the test after clearing the PI. Amity School of Communication offers admissions to majority of the courses on the basis of merit. Amity School of Communication offers a wide range of courses ranging from UG, PG and PhD. The most popular ones include BA Journalism and Mass Communication, MA Journalism and Mass Communication, MA Advertising and Marketing Management, PhD (Mass Communication), etc. The school also offers certification courses in Photography and Podcast.

eligibility_selection.title: Amity School of Communication Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Amity school of Communication admissions open from the registrations of the candidates online. The school accepts the merit of the last qualifying exam, except for MBA for which a written test is conducted. Candidates must pass class 12 to apply for UG courses and at least a UG degree for post graduate courses. It is also mandatory to clear the personal interview, if not offered direct admission. admission_process.title: Amity School of Communication Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amity School of Communication admission processhas three stages. For MBA a written test is conducted. A breakdown for the same is below:-

The first step in taking admission in Amity School of Communication is the registration process. This can be done both online and offline and the candidates have to pay a predetermined fee and fill in the requires details with the documents. The form is available on the application form site.
Selection Process

After completion of the registration, students forms are reviewed and the eligible candidates based on their qualification and marks are called for a personal interview round with the faculty. For MBA, a written test is conducted if not granted direct admission.
Admission Confirmation
After the PI, selected candidates are inforned and have to submit the required documents and confirm their seat by paying theAmity School of Communication fees.
ASCO Fees 2025: Affordability & ROI

Students with 80% and above aggregate in class 12 are eligible for direct admission. The course is for a duration of three years, i.e., six semesters, with fee ranging from INR 4.8 lakh - 13.2 lakh. faqs.question: Is Amity School of Communications BA admission purely merit-based?
faqs.answer: No,Amity School of Communication BA admissionis not completely merit-based. The candidates does get shortlisted based on merit in Class 12 or equivalent examination. However, the selected candidates further have to go through an interview round as well. The students who clear the personal interview round get selected for admission.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BA at Amity School of Communication?
faqs.answer: The school of Communication admit students based on their performance in the last qualifying examination. Hence, the applicants Class 12 scores are considered. Shortlisted students for BA course are further called for the personal interview round by the Amity School of Communication. For enquiries related to direct admissions, it is advisable to reach out to the Amity School of Communication admission office.

faqs.question: What is the Amity School of Communication application fee of BA Journalism and Mass Communication?
faqs.answer: To submit the Amity School of Communication BA application, aspirants need to pay an application fee ofINR 1,500. This fee can be paid via online mode through credit card/debit card/net banking. Students should keep the payment receipt safe with them for future references. Only after the application fee payment, the form get submitted successfully. It must be noted that the mentioned application fee amount is as per the past years' records.

placement_data.title: Amity School of Communication Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The objective of Amity School of Communication placement cell is to provide students best-possible support and make them industry-ready. ASOC provides continuous career counselling to students. The placement cell also organises workshops and guest lectures by industry experts in order to give students the exposure needed to bridge the gap between academic learnings and industry demands. Apart from this, Amity School of Communication provides internships to its students.
Amity School of Communication students get placements in PR Firms, Advertising Agencies, Media Houses and Corporate sector after completing their graduation.

In the recent past, the highest and average package offered during placements stood at INR 20 LPA and INR 3.5 LPA . Further, the average package offered to UG and PG students was INR 3 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Everyone can take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good, and the library is also good. The hostel is very clean and provides good facilities. Good food is available in the mess and canteen. As per the rule, the university has its own sports and games area, and students don't face any problem regarding sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: One of the greatest colleges of my life.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 hostels among which anyone can be allotted to a candidate. Hostels are generally equipped with basic facilities and are generally comprised of twin-sharing rooms. Each hostel has its own food canteen where breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner are provided daily. There are ample options for vegetarian as well as non-vegetarian candidates.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better than other colleges in Delhi. Our college provides good placements. The campus is huge and clean. It has greenery. They conduct many activities. Students participate in all activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity School of Communication, Amity University, Noida.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls. Air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned hostel rooms are also there. Proper security is also available for the students, but the fee for the hostel is quite high and the timings are also not good. Students can't go for an outing even on weekends because of time restrictions and on weekdays, they are not allowed to leave campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the labs and hostel is good. The quality of food is average but rest everything is satisfactory. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped and ventilated. A medical room is provided in case of emergencies and there are good opportunities for athletes.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, amazing faculty, great infrastructure
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing, wifi works pretty well inside the campus. We’ve labs to do the computerized work, and our department even has a student lounge ( wherein students can chill for a while). Classrooms are very huge. The back support of some chairs are broken, but it doesn’t make it uncomfortable. I didn’t apply for the hostel. Amity has its own 24X7 clinic.

reviews.review_heading: I strongly recommended you to join this college. It's the best for BJMC.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is impressive, especially in the new buildings like ASD (amity school of design) and ABS (amity business school). The classes are fully air conditioned. The ASD department has specialised classes for the design students. The ASCO department has really great labs on the third floor where students can learn more than the books could ever teach.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements but the fee structure is high.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is enabled, editing laboratories, photography studios, library, radio room, etc., are available. I am a day scholar so I do not know about hostel facilities, but I live in PG. The canteen is big and good. It provides all types of food fast and proper lunch. There are different blocks and a big mess. The canteen is provided and there are different brands like Domino's, Subway, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are qualified, helpful and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available within college premises and the speed of Wi-Fi is also fine. Labs, classrooms and library are regularly cleaned and maintained. The quality of food at the college is also fine and they prepare different food at different days and special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity School of Communication, Amity University, Noida.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available within college premises and the speed of Wi-Fi is also fine. Labs, classrooms, and libraries are regularly cleaned and maintained. The quality of food at the college is also fine and they prepare different food on different days and special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity School of Communication.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was available on the premises, and the speed of Wi-Fi was also good. Laboratories, classrooms, and library were regularly cleaned and maintained. The quality of food at the college was also good, and they prepare different food on different days and special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: Amity is famous and the best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our school is superb. Classrooms are huge enough and clean. A canteen is available and is hygienic. Good quality food is available. The library has all the books students want, and the labs are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University is the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very friendly and luxurious. They have maintained their classrooms and floors. The management is quite good and effective. Security is super strict, and hostels are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good and friendly. Some of my friends used to stay in the hostel, and they say that the hostel is super friendly, neat and clean. A lot of things are provided by the university, so it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, Amity is the best college.
reviews.review_text: I really liked the infrastructure because it has good studios, and those studios were quite big and perfect for my course. I used to love to see new things which our college used to organise in different sectors. For now, it is the best.

college_info.college_name: Amity School of Communication Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amity School of Communication (ASCO) offers mainly merit-based scholarships to students based on the aggregate obtained in the qualifier and competitive exams. However, there are certain means-based scholarships, such as the Martyr’s Scholarship, which are offered to deserving candidates upon providing relevant documents. As of today, Amity School of Communication Noida, has offered scholarships to over 50,000 meritorious students.  Note: Granting of any scholarship is subject to the approval of the Scholarship Committee.

ASCO offers scholarships to UG and PG students based on merit and means. Furthermore, those who clear certain competitive exams can get up to 100% fee waivers. The university offers various types of scholarships to students, such as:
1. On-Admission Scholarship (UG programmes)
2. Scholarship Based on CUET 2025 (UG programmes)
3. Scholarship for BTech Programmes (Based on JEE Score 2025 and Class XII-2024/2025)
Fast Track admission and Scholarship will be offered in B.Tech. programmes based on the JEE 2025 score given as under:
4. Scholarship Based on CLAT 2025 for UG Programmes
5. Scholarship in Post Graduate Programmes
6. Scholarships Based on CAT percentile - PG Programmes
7. Sports Scholarship

Amity School of Communication offers Sports scholarships to talented Sportspeople. It is granted based on the selection process, interview & sports trial, and the assessment of sports certificates for the last three years. (As applicable)
8. Martyr’s Scholarship:

Martyr’s scholarship is offered to the wards of deceased soldiers in recognition of the services rendered to the nation. It is mandatory to meet the minimum academic eligibility of the respective program and to appear in the prescribed selection process. Further, a 100% scholarship will be given to selected students based on the scrutiny of the Scholarship Committee.
- Wards of Martyrs from any of the following organisations are eligible for the Scholarship:

Interested students who are given Fast Track admissions after Class 12 are given scholarships. However, Direct Admission is not available for PG students applying for scholarships. Limited scholarship seats are available, and students will be awarded scholarships only after the verification of original documents. Furthermore, scholarships are only valid till the first year after admission, and scholarship continuation rules may apply from the second year.
The steps to apply for any scholarship are as follows:
For detailed information regarding the scholarships, interested students might visit the official website.
Note: Direct Admission/ Fast Track Admission-cum-Scholarship is not applicable for the programmes of Architecture/ Design/ Education/ Fashion/ Fine Arts/ Law and Physical Education.
